title: Bananas
description: A Forge mod that adds bananas and banana trees/plants with their functionality.
body:
# Bananas This mod adds bananas and banana plants/trees (whatever you call them!) to Minecraft! Bananas will later be part of a modpack called Fruits which will have mods like this one.
### Banana The banana is a food item which has a nutritional value of 4 and a saturarion of 0.3. It can only be obtained by breaking a Mature Banana Bunch.
### Banana Tree/Plant The banana tree is the tree where the banana bunch matures to give bananas. To farm it you must place a Banana Tree Root and wait about 15 minutes for it to grow. Once it has grown it will start to develop a banana bunch. This tree is composed of Banana Tree Stem and Banana Tree Leaves.
### Banana Tree Stem This is the block that forms the stem of the Banana Tree.
### Banana Tree Leaves These have a slab form and are the leaves of Banana Trees.
### Banana Tree Root This block can be found throughout tropical areas and forests. You must collect it and place it wherever you want your Banana Tree to grow. You can also obtain from 1 to 3 Banana Tree Roots by mining Mature Banana Bunches which is the last stage of the banana bunch growing on the Banana Trees.
### Banana Bunch Stage **Stage 1:**
This is the first stage that appears when the Banana Tree first grows. It takes about 15 minutes to go to stage 2. **Stage 2:**
This stage takes about 15 minutes to change to stage 3 which is the final one. **Stage 3:**
This stage is the Mature Banana Bunch, in this stage you can mine this bunch and obtain 12 bananas and 1-3 Banana Tree Roots to keep growing more Banana Trees. That's all for this mod, hope you enjoy it!! Makes suggestions and report bugs in this server: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4 By RoCris
